description_long: This is a military-style, six-wheeled cargo truck with an olive drab green cab and a large, open wooden flatbed at the rear. The cab features a prominent white star insignia on the hood and door, evoking classic U.S. military vehicles. The truck has a robust, utilitarian design with heavy-duty tires suitable for off-road and urban environments. The flatbed is constructed from wooden planks and is bordered by low side rails, making it ideal for transporting goods or equipment. The front of the truck is equipped with a sturdy bumper and a visible exhaust pipe on the passenger side. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, with a focus on practicality over aesthetics.
description: A military-style, six-wheeled cargo truck with an olive green cab and a wooden flatbed, featuring white star insignias and rugged tires.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open wooden flatbed and the back of the cab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the flatbed, three axles, and the white star on the door.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the cab, windshield, bumper, and a large white star on the hood.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the flatbed, three axles, and the white star on the door.
